login.title: SCAManager
login.subtitle: Claude reviews your PR and provides scores and feedback

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: How is our code flowing?

modes.security_tooltip: GitHub Code Scanning + Secret Scanning alert audit (Cycle 73 F2 — read-only)
modes.usage_tooltip: Own usage (SaaS Phase 1 read-only — Cycle 79 PR 3b)

kpi.auto_merge_tooltip: PR-based final success rate (after retries). Simple-attempt success rate is shown in sub-text.

dashboard.no_trend_data: No analysis data in the last {days} days.
dashboard.no_frequent_issues: No issues found in the last {days} days.

feedback_cta.title: 📝 Please give feedback on AI scores
feedback_cta.meta_zero: Use the 👍 / 👎 buttons on the analysis result page to indicate score accuracy — this improves AI calibration.
feedback_cta.meta_some: {count} feedback items so far — leave more feedback to improve AI calibration accuracy.

security.kill_switch_active: 🚫 Security auto-processing disabled (`SECURITY_AUTO_PROCESS_DISABLED=1`) — kill-switch is active. Unset the env var to resume cron polling.
security.empty_hint_part1: A cron polls GitHub Code Scanning + Secret Scanning APIs every hour, and new alerts will appear here.
security.empty_hint_link: View directly on GitHub Security tab
security.load_failed: ⚠️ Failed to load Security data — please try again later.

usage.empty_hint_part1: Register a GitHub repo on the
usage.load_failed: ⚠️ Failed to load Usage data — please try again later.
usage.avg_score_hint: Shown as - when sample is insufficient
usage.saas_info_li2: Token cost estimation = Phase 2 (after per-user cost tracking infrastructure)
usage.saas_info_li3: On SaaS transition (users ≥ 2), the same cards isolate per-user automatically

insight.refresh_tooltip: Force cache invalidation + generate new narrative (Anthropic API call)
insight.no_api_key: 🔑 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not set — Insight mode requires AI analysis. Please set the key in Railway Variables.
insight.no_data: 📭 Insufficient analysis data in the last {days} days — please try again after results accumulate.
insight.load_failed: ⚠️ AI Insight generation failed ({status}) — please try again later.

tutorial.title: Get Started in 3 Steps
tutorial.subtitle: Connect a GitHub repo to start automatic analysis on Push/PR
tutorial.step1_desc: Choose one of your OAuth-connected repos, and a Webhook will be auto-created.
tutorial.step2_desc_part1: After registration, select one of the
tutorial.step2_desc_part2: in the settings page. Simple Mode defaults are Python analysis + Telegram notifications + PR comments.
tutorial.step3_desc: Push your code, and analysis results will accumulate automatically in the dashboard. Provide thumbs feedback on score correctness to improve calibration.
tutorial.tip_desc_part1: — Up to 89 points (B grade) can be analyzed even without

calibration.title: AI Score Calibration
calibration.hint: How well Claude's scores align with human judgment — 👍 ratio per score range

add_repo.subtitle: Webhook will be auto-created when you select a GitHub repo
add_repo.hint_default: Loading accessible repos from GitHub API.
add_repo.no_repos_hint: All repos are already registered or no accessible repos available.

repo_detail.filter_empty: No analysis entries match your filters.
repo_detail.hook_installed_title: CLI code review hook is set up!
repo_detail.hook_installed_desc_part1: Run the following in your local repo, and code review will run automatically on

feedback.prompt: Do you think this score is accurate?
feedback.thumbs_up_aria: Feedback that this score is accurate (Thumbs up)
feedback.thumbs_down_aria: Feedback that this score is inaccurate (Thumbs down)

ai_defaults.title: AI review defaults applied
ai_defaults.no_api_key: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is not set, so neutral defaults were applied to AI scores.
ai_defaults.api_error: AI API call failed, so defaults were applied. Please check server logs.
ai_defaults.empty_diff: No analyzable code changes — defaults applied.
ai_defaults.parse_error: AI response parsing failed — defaults applied.
ai_defaults.other: AI review could not run — defaults applied.

empty.legacy_no_result_part1: This analysis has no detailed data.

settings.title: Settings
settings.language_description: Select your preferred language. Changes apply immediately.

settings_page.simple_only_hint: ⚙️ For more precise controls (approve thresholds · Discord/Slack/Email · CLI Hook · repo deletion etc.), click the Advanced toggle above.

onboarding.intro: Complete the steps below to receive analysis results.
onboarding.step1: ① Configure a notification channel → Connect Telegram or another channel from the Outbound Channels card below
onboarding.step2: ② Choose review level → Select a preset under Quick Settings above (optional)

webhook_stale.title: Webhook reinstall required
webhook_stale.desc: Auto-merge retry may be delayed: check_suite event is not subscribed. Reinstalling the webhook enables immediate retries on CI completion.

preset_card.desc: Expanding a card auto-applies its settings. Verify and click the Save button to commit. Notification channel URLs (Slack, Discord etc.) are not modified.
preset_card.channel_unchanged: This preset does not modify notification channel URLs.

pr_rules.pr_comment_desc: Auto-post the AI review as a PR comment when analysis completes
pr_rules.auto_merge_desc:
Squash merge when score is above threshold.
pull_requests: write permission required
pr_rules.semi_auto_hint: 💡 Semi-auto Approve is sent to the Telegram Chat ID in the notification channel card.
pr_rules.merge_issue_desc:
Auto-create a GitHub Issue with
failure reason + recommended action

post_event.commit_comment_desc:
Post AI review results as
GitHub commit comments on push
post_event.create_issue_desc:
Auto-create a GitHub Issue when
score is low or HIGH security finding detected
post_event.railway_alerts_desc:
Auto-create an Issue with logs
when Railway build fails

notify.telegram_chat_id_hint: If unset, the global Chat ID is used · also used for semi-auto Approve
notify.telegram_link_hint: Link your account using the /connect command in the Telegram bot.

inbound.behavior_notice: 💡 Each item behaves differently — 🔗 Reinstall GitHub Webhook / 🔄 Recommit CLI Hook buttons execute immediately on click. Only the Railway API token is applied via the 💾 Save settings button at the bottom.
inbound.github_reinstall_hint: GitHub sends push · PR · check_suite events to SCAManager.
inbound.hook_fail: ❌ Failed to commit files. Check GitHub token (repo scope).
inbound.railway_token_placeholder: railway_api_token (200 build log lines included when set)
inbound.railway_token_hint: Issue from Railway Dashboard → Account Settings → Tokens. Leave as-is to keep unchanged.
inbound.railway_webhook_hint: Add the URL above under Railway Project Settings → Webhooks.
inbound.railway_webhook_pending: Railway Webhook URL will be auto-generated after saving settings.

danger.behavior_notice: 💡 Actions in this card execute immediately on click (no save needed).
danger.delete_repo_desc:
Remove this repository from SCAManager.
The GitHub Webhook and all analysis history will be permanently deleted.
danger.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{repo_name}" repository?\n\nAll analysis history and the GitHub Webhook will be permanently deleted.
danger.webhook_reinstall_confirm: Reinstall GitHub Webhook.\nThe existing webhook will be deleted and a new one created.

tenants.subtitle: SaaS multi-tenant usage — read-only / This page is admin only
tenants.empty_hint: Tenants appear automatically once a user signs in via GitHub OAuth.
tenants.info_li1: This page is read-only — user data cannot be modified
tenants.info_li2: When kill-switch is active (`SAAS_MULTITENANT_DISABLED=1`), this page returns 503
tenants.info_li4: Phase 2 area (billing / usage caps / per-tenant API key) = separate PR required

rls_audit.subtitle: Supabase PostgreSQL Row Level Security matrix — static / alembic migration results
rls_audit.info_li1: RLS applied = PostgreSQL only (SQLite unit tests auto-skip)
rls_audit.info_li3: contextvars bridge = `src/shared/rls_context.py` + DB event listener (`SET LOCAL app.user_id`)
rls_audit.info_li4: 2-layer safety = (1) app-level filter (`_apply_*_user_filter`) + (2) DB RLS policy (PG/Supabase)

operations.subtitle: 5 KPIs (cache / API cost / merge / pipeline latency) — admin only / in-memory counters (reset on process restart)
operations.latency_phase2_pending: 📭 Phase 2 area — in-memory counter infrastructure not yet present
operations.i18n_fallback_hint: Higher fallback rate = more missing translations — operator action required (resets on process restart)
operations.info_li1: In-memory counter limit — resets on Railway redeploy (cache stats / api_cost). DB persist = Phase 2 area
operations.info_li2: silent fallback streak — 5 consecutive cache misses trigger logger WARNING (paired with Sentry)
operations.info_li3: 1-week baseline report = Cycle 81+ separate work (option C — cross-verify NEW-P0-3 alignment)
operations.info_li5: Sentry activation = Cycle 80 PR 1 runbook (`docs/runbooks/sentry-activation.md`) pair

commands.connect_already_linked: This Telegram account is already linked to another user.
commands.stats_no_data_body: No analysis data in the past 7 days.
